utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 keys. Now check if each is fully specified with required details:
- health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided: physical_health and mental_health each with named plan and explicit monthly cost. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided: photography_equipment coverage with cost, but not home/contents insurance. Not fully specified per required item.
- travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Provided: adventure_travel plan with cost. This fits travel insurance with cost. Fully specified.
- additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided: professional liability indemnity plan with cost. Fully specified.
- total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided: monthly and annual totals. Fully specified.
Thus, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Map each selected plan in the final coverage plan to the exact matching item name in the ground-truth ratings and extract its numeric rating. The final plan includes: SecureLife Basic Plan (physical health) -> primary_health_coverage.physical_health.SecureLife Basic Plan rating 4; SecureLife Basic Plan (mental health) -> primary_health_coverage.mental_health.SecureLife Basic Plan rating 8; InsurePlus Standard Coverage (property/home content) -> property_protection.home_content.InsurePlus Standard Coverage rating 10; InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel) -> mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.InsurePlus Standard Plan rating 10; Professional Indemnity & General Liability - Comprehensive Plan is not present in ground-truth, so it is omitted.
